title: Bug fixes and improvements
description: Fixes macOS launch issues and player head avatar display.

features.title: Fixes
items: Fixed macOS versions failing to launch (Java PID timeout) by adding a direct spawn fallback
Fixed player head avatar showing Steve instead of the correct 3D skin
Updated account manager to use proper avatar rendering
Improved Fabric installer URL resolution to use authoritative meta API URLs

title: This is the first release of Lean Launcher.

features.title: Lean Launcher Features
items: Per-instance settings with RAM and JVM controls
Instance file manager with upload and drag/drop support
Theme system, language selection, and profile selection

features.title: Client Features
items: Multiple version targets and profile options
Ready for lightweight and customizable setups

features.title: Cross-Platform Support
items: Native window controls work on Windows, macOS, and Linux
GitHub Actions CI/CD for automated multi-platform builds

features.title: macOS Enhancements
items: Dock, menu bar, and keychain now show 'Lean Launcher' instead of 'Electron'
Custom Lean Launcher icon visible in the Dock and app switcher
